# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Application
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up build environment
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y build-essential

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          mkdir -p build
          make all
          
      - name: Prepare artifacts
        run: |
          mkdir -p artifacts/binaries
          mkdir -p artifacts/config
          mkdir -p artifacts/scripts
          cp -r build/* artifacts/binaries/
          cp -r config/* artifacts/config/ || true
          cp -r deploy/* artifacts/scripts/ || true

      - name: Upload compiled binaries
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: binaries-${{ github.sha }}
          path: artifacts/binaries/
          retention-days: 30

      - name: Upload configuration files
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: configuration-${{ github.sha }}
          path: artifacts/config/
          retention-days: 30

      - name: Upload deployment scripts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deployment-scripts-${{ github.sha }}
          path: artifacts/scripts/
          retention-days: 30

      - name: Upload complete build package
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: complete-build-${{ github.sha }}
          path: artifacts/
          retention-days: 30
          compression-level: 9

  build-summary:
    name: Build Summary
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Create build summary
        run: |
          echo "## Build Artifacts Available" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "The following artifacts have been created and are available for download:" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Compiled Binaries**: binaries-${{ github.sha }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Configuration Files**: configuration-${{ github.sha }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Deployment Scripts**: deployment-scripts-${{ github.sha }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Complete Build Package**: complete-build-${{ github.sha }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "Artifacts will be retained for 30 days." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
